items.description: Dock items: { id, icon, label?, href?, onClick?, disabled?, badge?, separatorAfter? }

position.description: Edge of the viewport the dock attaches to

layout.description: Visual treatment of the dock container

gradient.type: { from: string; to: string; angle?: number }
gradient.description: Gradient stops, used when background is 'gradient'

magnification.description: Peak scale factor of hovered/focused item; 1 disables magnification

magnificationDistance.description: Radius (px) over which magnification falls off

iconSize.description: Base icon container size in px

gap.description: Base gap between dock items in px

autoHide.description: Slide off-screen and reveal on edge hover/focus

autoHideDelay.description: Milliseconds before hiding after pointer leaves

triggerZone.description: Px-thick hot zone along the edge that reveals an auto-hidden dock

showTooltips.description: Show item labels as tooltips on hover/focus

mode.description: 'fixed' attaches the dock to the viewport edge; 'inline' renders it inside its parent layout

onItemClick.description: Fired when a dock item is activated

ariaLabel.description: Accessible label for the dock toolbar (default: 'Dock')
